_notes.purpose: Example loss.json. loss.json controls black-box loss-guided optimization for one image and one prompt.
_notes.pipeline_config: Optional reference pipeline config. When diffusion/deepface use from_pipeline=true, those blocks are copied from this file.
_notes.input: Image to optimize. Overrides pipeline_config.input when provided.
_notes.output_dir: Parent folder for output/loss_run_<timestamp>. The runner creates a timestamped loss run folder inside this directory.
_notes.prompt: Text prompt used for both cached original diffusion and every perturbed diffusion candidate.
_notes.seed: Base seed for perturbation seeds, optimizer initialization, and diffusion. Used when randomize_seed is false.
_notes.randomize_seed: false uses seed exactly. true picks one random seed for the whole run before optimization starts.
_notes.random_seed_range: Inclusive [min, max] range used only when randomize_seed is true.
_notes.perturbations: Base perturbation templates. The optimizer updates only fields listed in parameters.bounds.
_notes.diffusion: Set from_pipeline=true to reuse pipeline.json diffusion. Or provide a full diffusion block with cpu/device/gpu_index/models.
_notes.deepface: Set from_pipeline=true to reuse pipeline.json DeepFace settings. Or provide enabled, detector_backend, distance_metric, workers, and models.
_notes.deepface_allow_parallel: true allows alpha_pre/alpha_post DeepFace model checks to run with parallel workers. false is simpler and less memory hungry.
_notes.optimizer.iterations: For SPSA, number of update steps. Each SPSA step evaluates plus, minus, and current candidates.
_notes.optimizer.learning_rate: SPSA normalized-space step size. Lower is safer; higher explores more aggressively.
_notes.optimizer.spsa_delta: SPSA plus/minus perturbation size in normalized parameter space.
_notes.optimizer.patience: If greater than 0, stop after this many non-improving updates.
_notes.optimizer.random_restarts: Number of starting points. Restarts after the first use random initialization.
_notes.optimizer.save_every: Write loss_history.json every N evaluations. Use 1 for safest long-run progress saving.
_notes.optimizer.stop.alpha_post_below: Stop when the best alpha_post falls at or below this value.
_notes.optimizer.stop.loss_below: Optional absolute loss stop threshold. null disables it.
_notes.objective.use_alpha_pre: true includes alpha_pre guardrail. When false, alpha_pre is not computed or penalized.
_notes.objective.use_beta: true includes beta visual constraints. When false, beta metrics are not computed or penalized.
_notes.objective.alpha_post: Main attack objective. Lower alpha_post is better. Enabled by default.
_notes.objective.alpha_pre: Pre-diffusion identity guardrail. Penalizes alpha_pre below target.
_notes.objective.beta.use_psnr: true computes and penalizes PSNR below target.
_notes.objective.beta.use_ssim: true computes and penalizes SSIM below target.
_notes.objective.beta.use_fid: true computes the lightweight single-image RGB FID approximation and penalizes values above target.
_notes.objective.beta.use_lpips: true computes LPIPS and penalizes values above target. Requires optional lpips package.
_notes.objective.beta.*.weight: Loss multiplier for that term. Higher means the optimizer cares more about that constraint.
_notes.objective.parameter_regularization: Penalizes moving far away from the initial normalized parameter vector.
_notes.parameters.initialization: fixed uses initial_values/templates. random starts from a random point inside bounds.
_notes.parameters.initial_values: Starting parameter values for fixed initialization. Can be nested by method name.
_notes.parameters.bounds: Optimizable fields and their min/max ranges. Integer fields such as grid and coefficients are rounded.
